steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage states the speaker "predicts future success," so the strongest clue is the explicit claim that the answer must directly express an unavoidable or guaranteed outcome of success.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: D states "We shall never know defeat," which directly frames success as a definitive, unbeatable outcome. A asks a question, B gives a command, and C refers to duty—none of which convey a guaranteed future success. That matches choice D — D is correct.
